rationale: Educ. Code §13.051 governs detachment and annexation of territory between school districts. It references taxable value thresholds but does not set or depend on the homestead exemption amount. No direct conflict with the proposed §11.13(b) increase.
quote: territory may be detached from a school district and annexed to another school district that is contiguous to the detached territory
_note: Rule text concerns school district boundary changes, not homestead exemption amounts. Any indirect effect on taxable value calculations would be operational, not a statutory conflict.
